payload.answer: Brain DB is the source of truth; Cognee is a rebuildable semantic projection; Slack is a strict memory intake agent. Telegram addition and cheapest high-performing model remain open questions.
payload.decision: Current architectural guidance: Brain DB should be the source of truth; Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection; Slack should act as a strict memory intake agent. Telegram addition and the cheapest model that still saturates performance remain open questions.

entity_resolution.reason: No ambiguous entity needed resolution from the provided summary.

payload.intent: Extract durable architectural takeaways and preserve open questions without overcommitting.

memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth for the system.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection rather than the source of truth.
Slack should function as a strict memory intake agent.
It is unresolved whether Telegram should be added later.
The cheapest model that still saturates performance has not yet been identified.

details: Preserved 2 open questions without resolving them.
No conflicting or deleted facts were present.

repair_options: Confirm whether Telegram should be added as a future intake channel.
Benchmark candidate models to identify the cheapest one that still saturates performance.
